title: Handle default argument values for class function method calls

features.name: class function with default arguments
features.description: Code should include a class function definition with parameters that have default values
features.snippet: class foo; function int bar(int x = 5, int y = 10); return x + y; endfunction; endclass

features.name: class function call with omitted trailing arguments
features.description: Code should include a class function call where trailing arguments with defaults are omitted
features.snippet:
class foo; function int bar(int x = 5, int y = 10); return x + y; endfunction; endclass
foo f; int result = f.bar(3);
